name: Pete Namchaisiri
assignment: I1 Easy to Understand: Find and describe 3 different information systems

informationSystems.name: King County Bus Routes
informationSystems.purpose: To provide information about bus routes, schedules, and maps for public transportation in King County.

informationSystems.name: Weather Information by Government
informationSystems.purpose: To provide weather forecasts, warnings, and climate information to the public.

informationSystems.name: Google Drive
informationSystems.purpose: To provide a platform for storing, sharing, and collaborating on files and documents.
